items.final_wording: Prioritises red flags, dehydration, severe alternate illness, age, fever, bleeding, persistent vomiting, neurological abnormality, and instability.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Gastroenteritis in Children – 07
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for pediatric acute-gastroenteritis telehealth documentation in Dubai; partial for any broader vomiting or diarrhea presentation.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Prioritises red flags, dehydration, severe alternate illness, age, fever, bleeding, persistent vomiting, neurological abnormality, and instability.

items.rationale: Supports dehydration, fever, bleeding, vomiting, neurological and instability warnings for child diarrhoea follow-up; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Lists age, fever, bleeding, persistent vomiting, dehydration, neurological, instability, caregiver, and worsening criteria for face-to-face assessment.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Gastroenteritis in Children – 07
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for pediatric acute-gastroenteritis telehealth documentation in Dubai; partial for any broader vomiting or diarrhea presentation.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists age, fever, bleeding, persistent vomiting, dehydration, neurological, instability, caregiver, and worsening criteria for face-to-face assessment.

items.rationale: Supports worsening, caregiver and face-to-face referral context for child diarrhoea follow-up; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Specifies duration, stool and emesis character, urine output, intake, fever, abdominal pain, medication, contact, and exposure history.
